author: pixelmason
title: Godot export chores
body: I wish there was a Godot plugin that exported Steam capsule art and itch thumbnails from in-game screenshots. I keep resizing the same assets for every project and would pay for something that handled presets.

author: indiegui
title: Capsule art presets
body: Looking for a tool that turns a few Godot screenshots into store capsule art, social cards, and press kit images. The manual Photoshop loop is painful when shipping small games.

author: dockable
title: Why is store art still manual?
body: Why doesn't this exist for Godot: a one-click store art generator with safe zones for Steam, itch, and Switch assets. I hate that launch week includes boring image resizing.

author: capsulecraft
title: Store page art
body: There should be a small paid plugin for Godot that captures screenshots, applies title overlays, and exports every Steam capsule size. My client keeps asking for revisions.

author: screensnap
title: Marketing asset tool
body: Can someone make a tool that creates consistent promo images from Godot scenes? I can't find anything that understands store dimensions and localization-safe text areas.

author: tilepanic
title: Tileset collisions
body: I hate that I have to rebuild tileset collisions by hand after every art pass. Is there a plugin for syncing Aseprite slices and collision shapes into Godot? This blocks me every project.

author: gridlock
title: Aseprite to Godot sync
body: I wish there was a reliable Aseprite to Godot tileset importer that preserved named slices, terrain sets, and collision metadata. I would buy this today.

author: autotiler
title: Tile metadata import
body: There should be a tool that watches my pixel art folder and updates Godot TileMap layers with collisions and navigation regions. Manual setup is wasting hours.

author: navmeshnerd
title: TileMap pain
body: I can't find a plugin that imports Aseprite tile metadata into Godot 4 without losing terrain sets. The existing scripts break whenever the atlas changes.

author: mapmaker
title: Collision sync
body: Can someone make a Godot addon that syncs tileset collisions from Aseprite JSON? I hate that a tiny sprite edit means redoing collision polygons again.

author: branchwriter
title: Dialog testing
body: Looking for a tool that lets me test branching dialogue and localization variables outside the full Godot game. Running the whole project for every line edit is frustrating.

author: locallines
title: Dialogue QA
body: I wish there was a Godot dialogue QA plugin that previews every branch, missing translation, and variable substitution before I ship. Our tiny team would pay for it.

author: narrativebug
title: Localization variables
body: There should be a simple editor that catches broken dialogue conditions and untranslated strings in Godot. I hate that narrative bugs only show up in late playtests.

author: inkbridge
title: Branch preview
body: Is there a plugin for previewing Godot dialogue branches with portraits, variables, and translations? I can't find one that non-programmer writers can use.

author: questcopy
title: Writer friendly tool
body: Can someone make a writer-friendly tool that validates Godot dialogue graphs and exports missing translation reports? This is urgent before our demo deadline.

author: soundcheck
title: Audio balance
body: I wish there was an automated audio loudness checker for Godot scenes. I hate that I only discover too-loud SFX after recording builds.

author: mixpass
title: SFX audit
body: Looking for a tool that scans Godot projects for inconsistent SFX volume, missing bus assignments, and clipping. I would pay for a plugin that reports this before export.

author: busdriver
title: Godot audio buses
body: There should be a Godot addon that audits audio buses and flags clips that are way louder than the rest. Manual listening passes are painful.

author: wavetable
title: Before export audio QA
body: Can someone make a simple audio QA plugin for Godot that checks loudness, bus routing, and missing loop points? This keeps coming back in client feedback.

author: earfatigue
title: Volume normalization
body: I can't find a tool that normalizes and reports SFX loudness inside a Godot project. It is annoying to bounce between Audacity and the editor.

author: cloudsave
title: Save migration
body: I hate that save-game migrations are always custom scripts. There should be a Godot plugin for schema versions, backups, and rollback tests.

author: versionedslot
title: Save file tests
body: Looking for a tool that tests old save files against new Godot builds. We are blocked because a demo save from last month crashes after the inventory update.

author: datapatch
title: Schema versions
body: I wish there was a save migration framework for indie games: versioned schemas, fixtures, and warnings when fields disappear. I would buy this for every commercial project.

author: slotdoctor
title: Godot saves
body: Is there a plugin for validating Godot save files and migrating them between releases? I can't find anything lightweight that works offline.

author: rollbackdev
title: Migration harness
body: Can someone make a local save-file migration test harness for Godot? It is painful to discover broken player saves after launch.

author: bindpanic
title: Controller icons
body: I wish there was a Godot plugin that automatically maps controller glyphs for Xbox, PlayStation, Switch, and Steam Deck. I keep shipping wrong button prompts.

author: glyphquest
title: Input prompt mess
body: There should be a tool that detects active controller type and swaps button icons in Godot UI. I would pay for a clean commercial asset.

author: decktester
title: Steam Deck prompts
body: I can't find a reliable Godot 4 controller glyph plugin with Steam Deck support. The manual mapping tables are annoying and easy to break.

author: buttonart
title: Glyph asset pipeline
body: Looking for a tool that keeps controller glyph assets and Godot input actions in sync. We have a deadline and wrong prompts keep failing QA.

author: promptfix
title: Button prompt plugin
body: Can someone make a Godot addon for button prompts that handles remapping, controller glyph packs, and localization? Why doesn't this exist as a polished paid plugin?

author: releasebot
title: Release checklist
body: I hate that indie release builds rely on sticky notes. There should be a local tool that checks Godot export presets, icons, version numbers, and missing licenses.

author: shipshape
title: Export preset audit
body: Looking for a tool that audits Godot export presets before upload. I can't find anything that catches missing app icons and stale version strings.

author: licenser
title: License checking
body: I wish there was a release QA plugin for Godot that finds unused assets, missing licenses, and broken export presets. I would buy it to avoid launch day mistakes.

author: betacandidate
title: Preflight for Godot
body: Can someone make a preflight checklist tool for Godot exports? It should warn about debug flags, missing icons, and files accidentally left out of the build.

author: finalfinal
title: Build QA
body: Why doesn't this exist: a local indie game release auditor that scans Godot settings, store assets, license files, and export templates before shipping.
